name: anx-core-skill
description: ANX Core Skill - Provides API capabilities for ANX markup output and CLI execution
author: ANX Team

triggers.description: When user needs to work with ANX format, convert ANX to Markdown/Markup, execute CLI commands, or generate node visualizations

capabilities.name: convertAnxToMarkup
capabilities.description: Convert ANX content to Markup format

capabilities.name: convertAnxToNodes
capabilities.description: Convert ANX content to nodes structure

capabilities.name: generateNodeVisualization
capabilities.description: Generate node visualization HTML and CSS

capabilities.name: getCliCommands
capabilities.description: Get list of available CLI commands

capabilities.name: readUsageFile
capabilities.description: Read a specific usage documentation file
